name: ROTTMNT - Donatello
description:
Request

╔⏤⏤╝╚⏤⏤╗

Chomper

༺♥༻❀༺♥༻

As much as Donnie loved you, you had some weird habits. He wasn't sure why you did what you did, but being bit had become a normal part of his day-to-day life.

༺♥༻❀༺♥༻

For @Endless_Shades

dude I dunno what you were on about. I've never had a friend that randomly bit me. Maybe because I'm 5'0. I was more likely to be babied that teased.

Or used as an armrest.

drank a lot of water, still felt like ass

took a nap, still felt like ass

BUT NOW I HAVE TAKEN IBUPROFEN AND NO ONE CAN STOP ME NOW THAT I FEEL BETTER

also Mikey x Mondo propoganda even though there isn't a ROTTMNT Mondo (let me dream)
creator: ChatterBeak
